news.title:
NCLT Amaravati approves Laurus Labs' reorganization scheme, involving subsidiaries.
Laurus Synthesis unit demerged to Sriam Labs; remaining merges with Laurus Labs.
news.summary:
NCLT Amaravati approves Laurus Labs' reorganization scheme, involving subsidiaries.

news.title: Citi retains Sell rating on Laurus Labs, cutting target price to 730.

news.title:
Laurus Labs' H1 FY26 revenue grew 33% YoY to ₹3,223 crore, with EBITDA margins at 25.4%, driving a 76% share price rise despite high P/E of 81x.
Jain Resource Recycling saw 27% revenue growth in H1 FY26, led by lead segment expansion, while Syrma SGS focuses on high-margin industrial/auto segments, boosting profitability.
news.summary:
Laurus Labs' H1 FY26 revenue grew 33% YoY to ₹3,223 crore, with EBITDA margins at 25.4%, driving a 76% share price rise despite high P/E of 81x.
Jain Resource Recycling saw 27% revenue growth in H1 FY26, led by lead segment expansion, while Syrma SGS focuses on high-margin industrial/auto segments, boosting profitability.

news.title:
Goldman Sachs raised Laurus Labs' target price to 900, citing cautious stance.
Concerns highlighted include weak earnings quality and high valuations.
news.summary:
Goldman Sachs raised Laurus Labs' target price to 900, citing cautious stance.
Concerns highlighted include weak earnings quality and high valuations.

news.title:
Laurus Labs reported 9M FY26 revenue of 14.9B, up from 10.4B YoY.
The company showed strong growth in its CDMO segment during this period.
news.summary:

news.title: Laurus Labs Q3 revenue rose to ₹17.8B from ₹14.1B YoY.

news.title:
Laurus Labs Ltd hosted its Q3 FY26 earnings call on Jan 23, 2026.
The call, hosted by DAM Capital Advisors, shared financial highlights and forward-looking insights.
news.summary:

news.title:
Indian pharma firms are expected to see 8-9% revenue growth in Q3FY26, led by domestic demand and select speciality portfolios.
Lupin is poised to outperform peers, while Ajanta Pharma and Eris Lifesciences lead with double-digit growth due to strong domestic execution.
news.summary:
Indian pharma firms are expected to see 8-9% revenue growth in Q3FY26, led by domestic demand and select speciality portfolios.
Lupin is poised to outperform peers, while Ajanta Pharma and Eris Lifesciences lead with double-digit growth due to strong domestic execution.

news.title:

news.title:
Force Motors and L&T Finance are the only Nifty 500 stocks doubling investor wealth since last Christmas, with Force Motors surging 176% and L&T Finance 119%.
Laurus Labs, RBL Bank, and Muthoot Finance also posted significant gains, rising 91%, 87%, and 87%, respectively, amid a tough year for multibagger hunters.
news.summary:
Force Motors and L&T Finance are the only Nifty 500 stocks doubling investor wealth since last Christmas, with Force Motors surging 176% and L&T Finance 119%.
Laurus Labs, RBL Bank, and Muthoot Finance also posted significant gains, rising 91%, 87%, and 87%, respectively, amid a tough year for multibagger hunters.

news.title:
Laurus Labs invested INR 34.99 cr to acquire 13,487 Series A3 Preference Shares in Laurus Bio.
This investment increases Laurus Labs' shareholding in Laurus Bio to 75.6%.
news.summary:
Laurus Labs invested INR 34.99 cr to acquire 13,487 Series A3 Preference Shares in Laurus Bio.
This investment increases Laurus Labs' shareholding in Laurus Bio to 75.6%.
